description:
Introduce user-authored YAML workflow files that compile to the internal workflow-config.v2.json format. Users should be able to define pipelines, phases, skip conditions, and verdict routing in YAML committed to their repo.

Changes needed:
1. Define YAML schema for ao.workflows.yaml (or .ao/workflows/*.yaml)
2. Add serde_yaml dependency to orchestrator-core
3. Add YAML parser that deserializes into existing WorkflowConfig types (PipelineDefinition, phase catalog)
4. Add compile step: on daemon startup and ao workflow config reload, read YAML files and merge with JSON state
5. YAML takes precedence over JSON for pipeline definitions when both exist
6. Add ao workflow config compile command to manually trigger YAML-to-JSON compilation
7. Validate compiled config using existing validate_workflow_config()

Depends on: TASK-168 (on_verdict routing), TASK-169 (skip_if guards)

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow_config.rs
- crates/orchestrator-core/Cargo.toml (add serde_yaml)
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_run.rs (startup reload)
title: Add YAML workflow definition surface with compile-to-JSON
